calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Continued To Nov-30-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Oct-27-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Ruchika Diaz, Esq. 213-628-3856 Mills Sadat Dowlat LLP for Plaintiff.
William Cosmopulos, Esq. Laura Tovar, Esq. 415-433-1940 Littler Mendelson P.C. for Defendant.

ARGUED. The Court admonishes parties. The Court reminds parties re: CCP 472a, local rules, violation of a court order is contempt. Mr. Cosmopulos apologizes to the court. The court takes a 5 minutes recess for counselors to read the CCP.

10:15 Court is back in session. The court shares its views re contemptuous behaviour. Ms. Diaz apologizes to the court and informs the court re amended complaint; no stipulation. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

Defendant Pacific Gas and Electric Company's Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is taken under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion For Relief From Waiver Of Objections To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One; (2) Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And (3) Declaration Of Camron Dowlatshahi
Off Calendar Oct-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
